summary: Duplicate Advisory: chi has an open redirect vulnerability in the RedirectSlashes middleware
details:
### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-mqqf-5wvp-8fh8. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
An Open Redirect vulnerability in the go-chi/chi >=5.2.2 RedirectSlashes function allows remote attackers to redirect victim users to malicious websites using the legitimate website domain.
